description: MULTIPLY with ON SIZE ERROR that should NOT fire — result fits in PIC 9(6)
notes: 999 * 999 = 998001. PIC 9(6) can hold up to 999999, so 998001 fits. SIZE ERROR should NOT fire. WS-FLAG should be 'N' (NOT ON SIZE ERROR branch). This tests that the engine correctly evaluates size error conditions — a false positive here would cause incorrect error handling in banking batch jobs.
